meta.title: Party.LAN hosted gaming parties
meta.description: Hosted PlayStation, Nintendo, racing and VR party experiences delivered to your venue with setup and a dedicated host.

hero.title: Bring everyone together. We’ll handle the rest.
hero.description: PlayStation, Nintendo, racing and VR experiences brought directly to your venue, with setup and a dedicated host included.

media.alt: Guests enjoying a hosted gaming party together across multiple displays.

packages_section.heading: Choose the experience that fits your party.
packages_section.description: Two clear hosted options, both built around shared play and a calm setup process.

addons_section.heading: Make it your own
addons_section.description: Add extra time, selected experiences or additional equipment to either package.

testimonials_section.heading: What the day felt like.
testimonials_section.description: Real experiences from hosted Party.LAN events.

steps.title: Choose a package
steps.description: Pick the hosted experience that best fits your group size and style of play.

steps.title: Tell us about the venue
steps.description: Share the room type, access notes and anything useful for planning the setup.
steps.image_alt: Room or venue layout for a Party.LAN setup.

steps.title: We deliver, set up and host
steps.description: Your host brings the equipment, keeps play moving and packs everything away.
steps.image_alt: Party.LAN host setting up gaming equipment.

gallery_section.heading: See the experience. Explore the setup.
gallery_section.description: Switch between the atmosphere of the party and the equipment used to create it.

room_planning.heading: More adaptable than it looks.
room_planning.description: Send us a room photo and we’ll help plan the layout. Party.LAN helps assess the room, access and power so you do not need technical knowledge — a photograph or rough dimensions are enough.

faq_section.heading: A few things you may want to know.
faq_section.description: Clear answers before you start planning.

terms_link.text: Need the full booking details? Read our Terms & Conditions.

final_cta.heading: Ready to plan your party?
final_cta.description: Online enquiries are opening soon. Package details are available above.

footer.tagline: Hosted gaming parties, delivered to your venue.

hero.heading: Two epic ways to party
hero.description: Choose the hosted experience that suits your group best.
hero.alt: Party.LAN gaming party setup with guests playing together.

intro.heading: Compare the experiences
intro.description: Both packages include delivery, setup and a party host/operator, with optional add-ons discussed during enquiry.

guidance.heading: Not sure which package fits?
guidance.description: Tell us about the group, room and style of party you want. We will help confirm the best hosted setup before anything is agreed.

cta.heading: Ready to reserve a date?
cta.description: Online enquiries are opening soon. Use the package details here to plan the right hosted experience.
